title: Chainsaw Spears
body:
This Resource Pack replaces all Spear models with animated 3D Chainsaw models. Some of them have unique style.\
Ex. Wooden Spear -> Chainsaw made out of cardboard box and paper.
![All chainsaws](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tryQUafl/images/2f7f3bc9bac5c26555ba781fe4ad728da65b8cb6.png)

This Resource Pack overrides only vanilla model files in the models/item folder
